title: gaultheria schramii
intro: Gaultheria schramii, also known as the Schramm's Gaultheria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. It is a shrub that is native to the mountainous regions of China. Gaultheria schramii contains medicinal properties, including triterpenoid saponins, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, and can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
